hero_tagline: A personal page for the games I play, the sites I build, and the stuff I'm into.
about: Hey, I'm Maks. This page is my corner of the internet where I can show what I play, what I make, and whatever else feels worth sharing.
more: I like building cool web stuff.
I enjoy retro game menus and glowing UI.
This site runs with Python and can be edited from the admin panel.
announcements: New update: admin panel now controls the whole homepage.
Site is live and ready for more custom sections.

posts.title: First Post
posts.body: This site is my own little command center on the internet.

posts.title: What I'm Building
posts.body: I like making pages that feel like game menus and old terminals.

timeline: Added a real admin control panel
custom_html:
Custom HTML Area

You can write your own HTML here from the admin panel.
custom_css: .custom-block { border: 1px solid rgba(84, 255, 157, 0.28); padding: 18px; background: rgba(84, 255, 157, 0.05); }
